---
title: "BiB (Bite-size Blogs)"
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  contents: posts # or whatever your folder name is
  type: grid      # Options: default, grid, or table
  categories: false # Set to false to hide the right-side "Categories" bar
  filter-ui: false  # Set to false to hide the search/filter box
  sort-ui: true    # Set to false to hide the "Order By" dropdown
---

Welcome to BiB! I summarise accessible information/theory/framework here, primarily with my co-researchers (i.e., Emma Whittaker, Iris Varela, Kieran Rose and Rose Matthews), but also targeting to a wider audience outside the academia.
